description: A featured video block combining a lazy-loaded video embed with a descriptive text panel, optionally wrapped in a link with an arrow indicator.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Featured video with heading and description, no link

props.heading: Sulaiman's story
props.description: Sulaiman is the first in his family to come to university. Without the financial support that his donor-funded scholarship offers, he'd never have been able to pursue his dream of becoming a doctor.

stories.name: WithSectionTitle
stories.description: Featured video with an h2 section title above it

props.heading: Session 1
props.description: Hear the experiences, challenges and opportunities of three respected professionals working in the charity sector.

stories.name: WithLink
stories.description: Featured video where the description panel links to another page, with arrow and feat-title

props.heading: Making our mark on the world
props.description: We're curious about the world and know our vital role in creating positive change within it.
props.featTitle: How we define and enable impact

stories.name: WithFigureCaption
stories.description: Featured video with a figcaption on the video figure element

props.heading: Magnomatics: Placing Talent Within Industry
props.description: "This experience has given me a strong engineering portfolio to put forward in future job interviews."

notes:
The component has two structural layers: the outer .paragraph--type--featured-video Drupal paragraph wrapper (with optional h2.field-multi-title section title), and the inner .featured-video block. When linkHref is provided, the .vid_descript div is wrapped in an element and a .link-arrow / .fmarrow arrow indicator is appended. The .feat-title appears as a

inside .descripttext when linkHref is set. VideoEmbedLazy handles the lazy video thumbnail and play button. The figure element always has class 'imgcapt'. VideoEmbedLazy and FieldMultiTitle are already built atoms.
